heading: Violations in obtaining and performing appraisals in federally related transactions
label: 3349 Violations in obtaining and performing appraisals in federally related transactions

children.text: for a financial institution to seek, obtain, or give money or any other thing of value in exchange for the performance of an appraisal by a person who the institution knows is not a State certified or licensed appraiser in connection with a federally related transaction; and

for the Federal National Mortgage Association, the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation, or the Resolution Trust Corporation to knowingly contract for the performance of any appraisal by a person who is not a State certified or licensed appraiser in connection with a real estate related financial transaction defined in to which such association or corporation is a party.section 3350(5) of this title

children.heading: Penalties
children.label: b Penalties
children.text: A financial institution that violates subsection (a)(1) shall be subject to civil penalties under or , as appropriate.section 1818(i)(2) of this titlesection 1786(k)(2) of this title

children.heading: Proceeding
children.label: c Proceeding
children.text: A proceeding with respect to a violation of this section shall be an administrative proceeding which may be conducted by a Federal financial institutions regulatory agency in accordance with the procedures set forth in subchapter II of chapter 5 of title 5.
